description_long: This helmet features a robust, rounded dome made of a dark brown material, with a prominent central ridge running from front to back. The front is equipped with a yellow face guard and a thick, stylized brown beard that appears to be part of the helmet's design, evoking a medieval or fantasy aesthetic. The sides are reinforced with additional brown panels that extend downward, providing extra protection to the cheeks and jaw. The rear of the helmet is smooth and curves gently downward, covering the back of the head and neck. There are no visible ventilation holes, logos, or graphic designs on the surface, giving it a solid, utilitarian appearance. The overall construction suggests a focus on protection and durability, with a matte finish and hard surface.
description: A dark brown, dome-shaped helmet with a central ridge, yellow face guard, and stylized brown beard, evoking a medieval or fantasy style. The helmet is solid, with reinforced sides and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded dome, central ridge, yellow face guard, and the stylized brown beard extending downward.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the yellow face guard, prominent central ridge, and the full stylized brown beard covering the lower face.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the dome, ridge, and beard, with the face guard partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, curved back of the helmet with no visible openings or features.
